criteria.reason: Separate apply endpoint is implemented and blocks mutation unless confirm_apply/explicit_confirmation is true.
Unit tests prove suggestions update userservices and mark items fixed.
Apply result, audit metadata, and boundary audit keep external writes and extra billing disabled.
Operator UI exposes apply confirmation, sends confirm_apply=true, and production build passes.
py_compile, focused pytest, backend lint baseline, frontend build, local UI smoke, backend deploy smoke, and frontend deploy passed.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_services_optimization.py tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_manual_publish.py
backend deploy smoke with route ownership check
